calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-329/MECH-189 wanting-before-liking developmental goal seeding (3-condition infant curriculum; super-ordinal anchor formation) -- supersedes 669; StepHarness loop rewrite
items.note: diagnose-errors fix of V3-EXQ-669 ERROR (exit 1, 2.1s, no sentinel on ree-cloud-4). Root cause: the hand-rolled act/train loop was written against a stale/nonexistent agent API -- env.to() on a numpy env, no-arg select_action(), nonexistent public e1_tick/e2_tick/e3_tick, a 4-tuple env.step unpack of a 5-tuple, and a mis-ordered emit_outcome(manifest, outcome, run_id) that also never wrote a manifest. The inner loop was rewritten onto the canonical StepHarness (experiments/_harness.py: one sense / one update_z_goal-with-super-ordinal-writes / one select_action / one update_residue per tick); E1+E2 trained via compute_prediction_loss/compute_e2_loss after each step (E3 running_variance driven by update_residue); manifest now writes flat JSON to evidence/experiments with a _v3 run_id + emit_outcome(outcome=, manifest_path=). claim_ids=[MECH-329, MECH-189] (user-confirmed): tests wanting-before-liking ordering AND exercises the MECH-189 super-ordinal goal-anchor substrate (use_super_ordinal_goal_anchors=True). Smoke: 3 conditions run end-to-end; 50/60-ep light run confirmed benefit contacts (23) -> super-ordinal write path reachable.

items.title: SD-034 commitment-closure-control-plane retest: env-completion hook + de-commit hold (supersedes 460c)
items.note: Validation of the 2026-06-12 commitment-closure-control-plane amend (ree-v3 6fdb111): Leg-A env sequence_complete -> agent.notify_env_completion -> emit_closure (eval loop) + Leg-B closure_decommit_hold_ticks=5 + Leg-C lateral_pfc_train_rule_bias_head=True. Readiness gate (642 lesson): ON n_closures>0 reachable on >=2/3 completion-engaged seeds -> else substrate_not_ready_requeue (never a false weakens). Acceptance: C1 n_closures>=1 + C3 nogo_installed>=1 + C2 + C4(OFF holds latch) on >=2/3. diagnostic. Re-applied after phase3-queue snapshot b89ebb5 dropped the first append (the documented 603d-class race).
